title: dortmanna concolor
side_effects: Dortmanna concolor can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps due to its high saponin content. Ingestion of large amounts can lead to more severe symptoms, including vomiting, headaches, and fatigue. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause damage to the kidneys and liver, potentially resulting in long-term health issues. Improper use of Dortmanna concolor can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
